channel.title: idea on Jonathan Ma
channel.description: Recent content in idea on Jonathan Ma

item.title: Onboarding
item.description: I decided to stay amidst the recent events. First day at work wasn’t as hectic as expected. In fact, it’s laid back and everyone are friendly and interesting. One intern studies UI/UX, which is rare in Hong Kong. I had very nice conversations with him. Hope I could learn a thing or two with him during my time here. So after today, I decided to build one of my own marketing compaign sites: a comment board with real-time count.
